languages.text: Кошмары, застигшие нас врасплох, отрицали саму природу реальности. Гигантские сегментированные тела беззвучно извивались в воздухе, то пропадая, то вновь появляясь, когда выстрелы лазружей проходили сквозь них. Их бесплотность была обманчива — длинные когти, пронзавшие одного человека за другим, не оставляли сомнений в своей материальности. Нам было нечего противопоставить подобному технологическому ужасу. Оставалось лишь...

traits.locale_text: Кошмары, застигшие нас врасплох, отрицали саму природу {g|Encyclopedia:Realspace}Материума{/g}. Гигантские сегментированные тела беззвучно извивались в воздухе, то пропадая, то вновь появляясь. Их бесплотность была обманчива — длинные когти, пронзавшие одного человека за другим, не оставляли сомнений в своей материальности. Нам было нечего противопоставить подобному технологическому ужасу. Оставалось лишь...

languages.text: The nightmares that ambushed us were an outrage against the very nature of reality. Giant segmented bodies wriggled silently through the air, disappearing and reappearing as lasgun shots passed through them. Their incorporeal appearance was deceptive; the long claws that pierced one man after another left no doubt that they were quite real. Nothing we had could match those technological monstrosities. The only option left was...

Их бесплотность была обманчива — длинные когти, пронзавшие одного человека за другим, не оставляли сомнений в своей материальности. Нам было нечего противопоставить подобному технологическому ужасу. traits.locale_text: The nightmares that ambushed us were an outrage against the very nature of reality. Giant segmented bodies wriggled silently through the air, disappearing and reappearing as lasgun shots passed through them. Their incorporeal appearance was deceptive; the long claws that pierced one man after another left no doubt that they were quite real. Nothing we had could match those technological monstrosities. The only option left was...

The nightmares that ambushed us were an outrage against the very nature of reality. Giant segmented bodies wriggled silently through the air, disappearing and reappearing by turns. Their incorporeal appearance was deceptive; the long claws that pierced one man after another left no doubt that they were quite real. Nothing we had could match those technological monstrosities. The only option left was...

The nightmares that ambushed us were an outrage against the Materium itself. Giant segmented bodies wriggled silently through the air, disappearing and reappearing by turns. Their incorporeality was deceptive — the long claws that pierced one man after another left no doubt as to their materiality. We had no means to oppose this horror. The only option left was...

The nightmares that ambushed us were an outrage against the very nature of reality. Giant segmented bodies wriggled silently through the air, disappearing and reappearing by turns. Their incorporeal appearance was deceptive; the long claws that pierced one man after another left no doubt that they were quite material. Nothing we had could match those technological monstrosities. The only option left was...

Their incorporeal appearance was deceptive; the long claws that pierced one man after another left no doubt that they were quite real. Nothing we had could match those technological monstrosities. The only option left was...

The nightmares that ambushed us were an outrage against the very nature of reality. Giant segmented bodies wriggled silently through the air, disappearing and reappearing as lasgun shots passed through them. Their incorporeal appearance was deceptive; the long claws that pierced one man after another left no doubt that they were quite real. Nothing we had could match those technological monstrosities. The only option left was...

languages.text: 那些伏击我们的梦魇，简直是对现实本身的公然亵渎。巨大的分节躯体在空中无声扭动着，在激光枪的射击穿透它们时，忽隐忽现。它们虚无缥缈的样子极具欺骗性，而接连被一根根长爪刺穿的人体，足以证明它们无比真实。我们现有的任何手段都无法抗衡这些技术怪物。唯一的选择，只剩下……
languages.original_text: The nightmares that ambushed us were an outrage against the very nature of reality. Giant segmented bodies wriggled silently through the air, disappearing and reappearing as lasgun shots passed through them. Their incorporeal appearance was deceptive; the long claws that pierced one man after another left no doubt that they were quite real. Nothing we had could match those technological monstrosities. The only option left was...

traits.locale_text: 那些伏击我们的梦魇，简直是对现实本身的公然亵渎。巨大的分节躯体在空中无声扭动着，在激光枪的射击穿透它们时，忽隐忽现。它们虚无缥缈的样子极具欺骗性，而接连被一根根长爪刺穿的人体，足以证明它们无比真实。我们现有的任何手段都无法抗衡这些技术怪物。唯一的选择，只剩下……

languages.text: Las pesadillas que nos emboscaron eran una afrenta contra la mismísima naturaleza de la realidad. Cuerpos gigantescos segmentados se retorcían silenciosos en el aire, apareciendo y desapareciendo mientras los disparos de rifle láser los atravesaban. A primera vista parecían incorpóreos, pero no tardamos en percatarnos de que sus garras eran perfectamente reales y más que capaces de agujerear a un hombre. No teníamos nada con lo que hacer frente a esas abominaciones tecnológicas. Nuestra única opción era...
languages.original_text: The nightmares that ambushed us were an outrage against the very nature of reality. Giant segmented bodies wriggled silently through the air, disappearing and reappearing as lasgun shots passed through them. Their incorporeal appearance was deceptive; the long claws that pierced one man after another left no doubt that they were quite real. Nothing we had could match those technological monstrosities. The only option left was...

traits.locale_text: Las pesadillas que nos emboscaron eran una afrenta contra la mismísima naturaleza de la realidad. Cuerpos gigantescos segmentados se retorcían silenciosos en el aire, apareciendo y desapareciendo mientras los disparos de rifle láser los atravesaban. A primera vista parecían incorpóreos, pero no tardamos en percatarnos de que sus garras eran perfectamente reales y más que capaces de agujerear a un hombre. No teníamos nada con lo que hacer frente a esas abominaciones tecnológicas. Nuestra única opción era...

languages.text: Les cauchemars qui nous attaquèrent étaient une offense directe à la nature même de la réalité. Leurs corps immenses et segmentés s'agitaient en silence dans les airs, disparaissant, puis réapparaissant au rythme des tirs de fusil laser qui les traversaient. Mais cette apparence immatérielle était trompeuse, les longues griffes qui transperçaient les hommes les uns après les autres ne laissant aucun doute quant à leur tangibilité. Nous n'étions absolument pas équipés pour rivaliser avec ces monstres technologiques. Il ne nous restait plus qu'une seule solution...
languages.original_text: The nightmares that ambushed us were an outrage against the very nature of reality. Giant segmented bodies wriggled silently through the air, disappearing and reappearing as lasgun shots passed through them. Their incorporeal appearance was deceptive; the long claws that pierced one man after another left no doubt that they were quite real. Nothing we had could match those technological monstrosities. The only option left was...

Nous n'étions absolument pas équipés pour rivaliser avec ces monstres technologiques. Il ne nous restait plus qu'une seule solution...

languages.text: Bize pusu kuran kâbuslar, gerçekliğin doğasına hakaretti. Devasa boğumlu vücutlar havada sessizce kıvrılıyor, silazer atışları içlerinden geçerken sırayla kaybolup tekrar beliriyordu. Bedensiz oluşları aldatıcıydı... Bir adamı diğerinin ardından delen uzun pençeleri, maddeselliklerine dair hiçbir şüphe bırakmıyordu. Bu dehşete karşı koyacak hiçbir aracımız yoktu. Geriye kalan tek seçenek...

languages.text: Der Albtraum, der uns überfiel, war eine Ohrfeige für die Natur der Realität selbst. Riesige segmentierte Leiber schlängelten sich lautlos durch die Luft und kamen und gingen, wenn unsere Lasergewehre sie trafen. Ihre vermeintliche Körperlosigkeit war allerdings trügerisch ... die langen Klauen, mit denen sie einen Mann nach dem anderen durchbohrten, waren ausgesprochen real. Wir hatten diesen technologischen Monstrositäten nichts entgegenzusetzen. Die einzige verbleibende Option war ...

languages.text: 襲いかかってきた悪夢は、マテリアムそのものを冒涜するようなものだった。巨大な節足動物は、静かに空を這い、次々と姿を消し、現れた。その無形は欺瞞だった。次々と男を貫く長い爪は、その物質性を疑う余地を与えなかった。この恐怖に立ち向かう手段はなかった。残された唯一の選択肢は…
